_comment: Whitelist of Facebook groups the `links` command builds per-group search URLs for (mirrors the companies.json pattern of the Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby skills). `id` is the numeric id OR the vanity slug from a group's URL (facebook.com/groups/<ID-or-slug>/) — both work in the /groups/<id>/search/?q= URL. Nothing here is fetched; ids only shape browse URLs you open yourself. The seed list below was verified from public web-search result URLs on 2026-07-20 (identifiers real as of then; Facebook group URLs can change, and viewing/joining requires your own login). To add a group: open it, copy the id/slug from the URL, add an { "id", "name" } entry.

groups.name: Việc Làm Lập Trình Viên - DevOps - Freelancer IT Việt Nam
IT Jobs - Tuyển Dụng IT - Việc làm CNTT - AI engineer
